name: codex
description: AI coding agent CLI — interactive and non-interactive software engineering assistant

name: -C
--cd
options.description: Use the specified directory as working root

name: -a
--ask-for-approval
options.description: Configure when human approval is needed

options.name: --remote
options.description: Connect TUI to a remote app server

options.name: --remote-auth-token-env
options.description: Env var containing bearer token for remote

name: -i
--image
options.description: Image(s) to attach to the initial prompt

options.name: --dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox
options.description: Skip all confirmation prompts and sandboxing

args.name: prompt
args.description: Optional user prompt to start the session

subcommands.name: mcp
subcommands.description: Manage external MCP servers for Codex

subcommands.name: mcp-server
subcommands.description: Start Codex as an MCP server (stdio)

subcommands.name: app-server
subcommands.description: Run the app server or related tooling

subcommands.name: update
subcommands.description: Update Codex to the latest version

subcommands.name: sandbox
subcommands.description: Run commands within a Codex-provided sandbox

subcommands.name: apply
subcommands.description: Apply the latest diff produced by Codex agent

subcommands.name: cloud
subcommands.description: Browse tasks from Codex Cloud and apply changes locally
